subtitle.en: Makes your existing Postgres or MySQL fast from Workers
subtitle.zh: 讓你現有的 Postgres / MySQL 從 Workers 連線變超快

tagline.en: Keep your current database — Hyperdrive makes it feel global and instant.
tagline.zh: 資料庫不用搬家——Hyperdrive 讓它連起來又快又像在全球各地。

text.en: Hyperdrive is an accelerator that sits in front of a database you already have (like PostgreSQL or MySQL) and makes querying it from Cloudflare Workers fast — no matter where in the world the request comes from.
text.zh: Hyperdrive 是一個「加速器」，它擋在你既有資料庫（例如 PostgreSQL 或 MySQL）的前面，讓你從 Cloudflare Workers 查詢它時變得很快——無論請求來自世界哪個角落。

text.en: Normally a regional database (one that lives in a single data center) is slow to reach from far away, and opening a fresh connection for every request adds delay. Hyperdrive fixes both with connection pooling and query caching.
text.zh: 一般來說，「區域型資料庫（regional database，指只住在單一機房的資料庫）」從遠方連過去很慢，而且每個請求都重開一條新連線又會多出延遲。Hyperdrive 用「連線池」和「查詢快取」同時解決這兩個問題。

text.en: A VIP fast lane to your database. Instead of dialing the database from scratch every time (slow handshakes), Hyperdrive keeps warm lines open and remembers recent answers — so most requests skip the wait.
text.zh: 一條通往資料庫的 VIP 快速通道。與其每次都從頭撥號連線（慢吞吞的握手），Hyperdrive 會保留幾條已經接通的熱線、還記住最近的答案——所以大多數請求都能直接跳過等待。

text.en: Workers run all over the globe, but your database lives in one place. Without help, every query pays a long round-trip and a connection setup cost. Hyperdrive removes that pain so your existing SQL database performs like it was built for the edge.
text.zh: Workers 跑遍全球，但你的資料庫只待在一個地方。沒有幫手的話，每次查詢都要付一趟長距離來回加上建立連線的成本。Hyperdrive 把這個痛點拿掉，讓你既有的 SQL 資料庫表現得像專為邊緣（edge）打造一樣。

text.en: Reuses a pool of warm database connections instead of opening one per request.
text.zh: 重複利用一池已經建好的熱連線，而不是每個請求都重開一條。

text.en: Caches results of popular read queries so repeats return almost instantly.
text.zh: 把熱門讀取查詢的結果快取起來，重複查詢幾乎瞬間回傳。

text.en: Keep your current Postgres/MySQL provider; just point Workers through Hyperdrive.
text.zh: 保留你現有的 Postgres / MySQL 供應商，只要讓 Workers 透過 Hyperdrive 連過去就好。

text.en: Far-away Workers query a single regional database without the usual lag.
text.zh: 遠方的 Workers 查詢單一區域資料庫時，不再有平常那種拖延。

title.en: You already have a SQL DB
title.zh: 你已經有 SQL 資料庫

text.en: An existing Postgres or MySQL on AWS, Neon, PlanetScale, etc. that you want to keep.
text.zh: 在 AWS、Neon、PlanetScale 等地方既有、又想保留的 Postgres 或 MySQL。

title.zh: 全球使用者、單一資料庫

text.en: Visitors worldwide but a single regional database that feels slow far away.
text.zh: 使用者遍布全球，但只有一個區域資料庫，遠方連起來很慢。

text.en: Serverless functions exhaust your database's connection limit — pooling fixes that.
text.zh: 無伺服器函式把資料庫的連線數用光——用連線池就能解決。

text.en: The same SELECTs repeat often, so caching delivers a big speed-up.
text.zh: 同樣的 SELECT 一直重複出現，快取就能帶來大幅加速。

text.en: Give Hyperdrive your database connection string (a connection string = the single URL with host, user, password, and database name). Then bind it and connect using a normal Postgres driver from your Worker.
text.zh: 把你資料庫的「連線字串（connection string，就是包含主機、帳號、密碼、資料庫名稱的那一串 URL）」交給 Hyperdrive。接著把它綁定，然後在 Worker 裡用一般的 Postgres 驅動程式連線即可。

text.en: Point it at your existing database with its connection string. Wrangler prints an id.
text.zh: 用連線字串讓它指向你既有的資料庫。Wrangler 會印出一組 id。

text.en: Add the id to wrangler.jsonc under the HYPERDRIVE binding.
text.zh: 把這個 id 加進 wrangler.jsonc 的 HYPERDRIVE 綁定。

title.zh: 安裝 Postgres 驅動程式

text.en: Use the popular pg package (add its TypeScript types too).
text.zh: 使用熱門的 pg 套件（順便裝它的 TypeScript 型別）。

text.en: Read env.HYPERDRIVE.connectionString and connect as usual — Hyperdrive handles pooling and caching for you.
text.zh: 讀取 env.HYPERDRIVE.connectionString，照平常方式連線——連線池和快取都交給 Hyperdrive 處理。

text.en: Publish your Worker and queries now flow through the fast lane.
text.zh: 發布 Worker，查詢就會走上快速通道了。

text.en: The single URL with host, port, user, password, and database name that locates your DB.
text.zh: 包含主機、連接埠、帳號、密碼和資料庫名稱、用來找到你資料庫的那串 URL。

text.en: A set of ready-made connections kept warm and shared across requests to avoid setup cost.
text.zh: 一組事先建好、保持熱線並在請求間共用的連線，藉此省下建立連線的成本。

text.en: Recent read-query results are remembered so identical repeats skip the database.
text.zh: 最近讀取查詢的結果會被記住，一模一樣的重複查詢就能跳過資料庫。

text.en: Hyperdrive only accelerates access; your real data still lives in your own database.
text.zh: Hyperdrive 只負責加速存取；你真正的資料仍然存放在你自己的資料庫裡。

title.zh: 依資料新鮮度調整快取

text.en: Query caching is on by default and is great for data that does not change every second. If a query must always return the very latest value, you can disable caching for it.
text.zh: 查詢快取預設開啟，很適合那些不會每秒都變動的資料。如果某個查詢一定要回傳最新的值，可以針對它關閉快取。

en: Hyperdrive is available on both Free and Paid plans, so you can try it at no cost.
It supports PostgreSQL (and compatibles like Neon, CockroachDB, Timescale) and MySQL.
Use ctx.waitUntil(client.end()) so closing the connection does not delay your response.
Need a Cloudflare-native SQL database instead? Look at D1.
zh: Hyperdrive 在免費與付費方案都能用，可以免費先試。
支援 PostgreSQL（以及 Neon、CockroachDB、Timescale 等相容資料庫）和 MySQL。
用 ctx.waitUntil(client.end()) 關閉連線，才不會拖慢你的回應。
想要 Cloudflare 原生的 SQL 資料庫？可以看看 D1。
